Job Title: Entry-Level Pre-Sales Engineer

Location: Hybrid/Remote In-Office

Job Type: Full-Time | Entry-Level

About The Role

We are seeking a highly motivated Entry-Level Pre-Sales Engineer to join our growing team. This role is designed for recent graduates eager to apply their technical and analytical skills in a customer-facing environment. The Pre-Sales Engineer will support Pre-Sales Solution Architects by conducting technology research, assisting with services and cloud pricing, and performing configuration item and contract reconciliation. This position offers the unique opportunity to be mentored by the most senior technical resources in the company, providing a solid foundation for career growth in pre-sales engineering, solution architecture, and enterprise IT consulting.

Key Responsibilities


Conduct technology research to support solution design and customer requirements.
Assist in pricing and configuration of IT services and cloud solutions by analyzing vendor pricing models and cost structures.
Support cloud pricing analysis and configuration for customer proposals.
Perform configuration item and contract reconciliation to ensure accuracy in customer agreements and solution designs.
Collaborate with Solution Architects to build technology solutions that align with customer needs.
Develop a strong understanding of enterprise computing concepts, including ERP, databases, networking, operating systems, data centers, and cloud computing.
Prepare and maintain documentation related to solution designs, pricing, and configurations.
Work with cross-functional teams, including sales, operations, and finance, to ensure accurate and competitive solutions.
Participate in training and mentorship programs led by senior engineers and solution architects.


Required Qualifications & Skills


Bachelor’s degree in Management Information Systems (MIS), Computer Science, Accounting, Finance, or a related business function with relevant computer science coursework.
Strong analytical and research skills with the ability to interpret and present technical information.
Basic knowledge of enterprise IT environments, including ERP systems, networking, operating systems, databases, data centers, and cloud computing platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).
Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other financial or pricing analysis tools.
Ability to learn quickly and adapt to new technologies and business models.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team-oriented environment.
No prior work experience required; internships or academic projects related to enterprise IT, cloud computing, or technology research are a plus.


What We Offer


Hands-on mentorship from senior technical leaders.
Exposure to cutting-edge enterprise technologies and cloud solutions.
A structured career development path in pre-sales engineering and solution architecture.
A dynamic and supportive work environment with opportunities to engage in real-world IT solution development.
Competitive salary and benefits package.


If you are a recent graduate with a passion for technology, enterprise IT, and business solutions, we encourage you to apply and start your journey with us!

Why Syntax?

Become a part of our success story and work in a company with exciting innovation projects that are causing a stir across the industry. We recently launched one of the world's most advanced manufacturing facilities based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud for Execution - for Smart Press Shop, a pioneering joint venture between Porsche and forming specialist Schuler.

title: Investment Banking Analyst
description:
Investment Banking Analyst (Graduates and Experienced Hires) - Mumbai







Our Client

Our subsidiary CF Invest, is a dedicated recruitment firm focused on positions in the investment sector.




We are recruiting on behalf of our client, one of the bulge bracket bank and pre-eminent investment banks.




This tier one firm works with us to select the highest calibre talent in the global markets at entry and experienced entry level across their global offices on an ongoing basis through the first half of each year, with the view of onboarding immediately or upon graduation.




Our client is looking for two professionals to join their Investment Banking team in Mumbai as an Analyst and use their skills and ideas to make an impact on the success of the bank. You will either be placed in their FIG, TMT or Energy Group or possibly another division as they also seek cross industry including but not limited to Industrials, Healthcare and Consumer.




The role requires talent to advise clients on various financial transactions, including mergers and acquisitions, equity/equity-linked and debt financings, joint ventures, restructurings, and financial investments.







Your Focus

As an Investment Banking Analyst, your focus is on supporting clients through complex capital markets and advisory transactions, including mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising. You will work closely with senior bankers to analyse opportunities, structure transactions, and help clients make informed strategic decisions.




The role is execution-driven and detail-intensive. You will build and maintain financial analyses, support transaction execution, and contribute to client materials used in live deals. You will also help assess risk, ensure adherence to regulatory and compliance requirements, and maintain the highest standards of accuracy, judgement, and professionalism.




This role suits someone who is analytically rigorous, commercially aware, and motivated by working at pace on high-stakes transactions. You will be expected to take ownership of your work, communicate clearly with colleagues and clients, and contribute meaningfully to deal delivery in a demanding, regulated environment.







Responsibilities

Support the execution of investment banking transactions, including M&A, capital raising, and strategic advisory mandates
Build and maintain detailed financial models and analyses to evaluate transactions and strategic options
Prepare client-facing materials, including pitch decks, information memoranda, and transaction documentation
Conduct company, industry, and market research to support deal origination and execution
Assist senior bankers in coordinating transaction workstreams and managing timelines
Support due diligence processes, including data analysis and coordination with internal and external stakeholders
Contribute to client development activities through research, analysis, and preparation of marketing materials
Assess transaction-related risks and support adherence to regulatory, compliance, and internal control requirements
Maintain high standards of accuracy, organisation, and confidentiality across all work
Work effectively with colleagues across banking, markets, legal, risk, and compliance teams




This role is about supporting the execution of complex investment banking transactions and helping clients make informed strategic and capital decisions.




You can absorb detailed financial and commercial information quickly, analyse companies, transactions, and market conditions with rigour, and form clear, well-reasoned conclusions. You approach problems with structure and discipline, and you are comfortable working under pressure as deals progress and priorities evolve.







Minimum Qualifications




Graduate – Analyst

Bachelor’s degree ideally in Finance, Economics, Accounting, Business, or a related discipline. We accept also individuals from any degree, especially those numerate based
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce clear client-ready materials
High attention to detail and strong organisational skills
Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple priorities
Sound judgement and a strong understanding of risk, compliance, and regulatory expectations
We consider any degree or subject and although your grade indicates your ability to absorb data and apply it, your degree grade does not influence your chance of applying to us and being interviewed.







Process

This application shall be open until we reach a cap of applicants, so please apply early. We are hiring for our client across their key global markets.




Be sure to Follow Us on LinkedIn for updates on this vacancy and others: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cfcorp




Your first step is to apply with your LinkedIn profile and CV. We do not need a covering letter. Due to the volume of applications we receive, we are unfortunately unable to provide individual feedback.







Reward Structure

Analyst annual base salary of 125,000 and up to 150,000 United States Dollars depending on experience. Your salary will be paid in Indian Rupees and bonus in USD
Bonus program of on-target bonus of 50% of base salary and up to 125% for high-achievers
Relocation is provided by the company.

title: Senior Associate - Strategy&
description:
Strategy& – Senior Associate – Strategy Consulting

Sectors – Consumer || FMCG || Industrial || FMEG || E-Commerce || Retail

Location – Mumbai || Gurgaon




Senior Associates at Strategy&, part of the PwC network, typically bring 3–5 years of experience and have demonstrated strong consulting or corporate strategy exposure across sectors and problem statements. They play a critical role in solving strategic challenges, working shoulder-to-shoulder with clients to address their most pressing issues — from growth and market entry to digital transformation and business model innovation.

Senior Associates are expected to contribute to the development of corporate and business unit strategies, evaluate market opportunities, structure problems, conduct analyses, and support end-to-end project delivery. Common areas of focus include Corporate Strategy, Growth Strategy, Go-to-Market Design, Market Entry, Digital Strategy and Transformation Projects.

Key Attributes and Abilities We Seek

As a Senior Associate, you will be expected to demonstrate analytical thinking, initiative, collaboration, and high personal drive. PwC Professional skills and responsibilities at this level include, but are not limited to:

Strong problem structuring and solving capabilities (quantitative and qualitative), and the ability to apply structured thinking across different industries and contexts.
Demonstrated ability to translate complex, ambiguous business issues into clear problem statements with actionable insights.
Conducting and synthesizing market research, primary interviews, competitive benchmarking, and data analysis to derive impactful recommendations.
Collaborating effectively in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment, providing and seeking regular feedback and clarification.
Supporting engagement leadership in project planning, workstream management, and client communication.
Drafting high-quality deliverables and client-ready presentations in a clear, structured, and insightful manner.
Engaging with client teams to understand business context, validate findings, and co-create solutions.
Driving internal initiatives and contributing to knowledge sharing and practice development.

What We Look For

We look for exceptional individuals who combine strong consulting fundamentals with intellectual curiosity, business acumen, and a collaborative mindset. Our ideal candidates demonstrate:

Strong academic and professional achievement; an MBA from a top-tier institution.
Experience in strategy, business planning, transformation, or business development roles in top-tier consulting firms or corporate strategy teams.
Strong analytical, communication, and storytelling skills, with the ability to distill insights from data and clearly articulate strategic narratives.
A reputation for problem-solving, creative thinking, and ability to connect the dots across business functions.
The ability to work with multiple stakeholders, handle ambiguity, and adapt in dynamic client situations.
A natural inclination toward collaboration and mentorship, with emerging leadership qualities.
High levels of ownership, self-motivation, and attention to detail.
Passion for a consulting career — being on the front line of solving real-world business problems.

What You’ll Bring (Experience & Qualifications)

3–5 years of experience in strategy consulting or relevant corporate roles.
1-3 years of experience in consumer, retail or industrials sector.
An MBA from a top tier institution.
Practical exposure in one or more of the following areas:
Corporate and Business Unit Strategy
Growth Strategy, Market Entry, Go-to-Market Design
Organizational or Digital Transformation
Business development, marketing, or sales strategy
Strong command of Excel, PowerPoint, and other analytical tools to structure and communicate insights.
Ability to adapt across industries and business issues, showing a solid understanding of market dynamics and enterprise levers.
Demonstrated experience in leading or co-leading workstreams and contributing to impactful client outcomes.




Sectors - Consumer || FMCG || Industrial || FMEG || E Commerce - Location - Mumbai || Gurgaon

This is a high profile client and project for our business, providing a platform for the project team to have a significant impact on the client’s brand strategies.

The role will involve working with our Research project teams, the Data Management & Dashboards team and with analytics experts to investigate and check data across multiple workstreams for our major tracking programs, primarily using Python.

About the team:

The Gurugram hub office is part of our global team, partnering with colleagues across different functional areas and specialisms. This is an exciting period of growth for Inizio Ignite | Research Partnership, as we expand into the fast-growing Indian market.

Your primary role:

As Data Quality Analyst, you will support the Program Data Manager to ensure data quality and consistency throughout the reporting cycle on our Major Tracking programs. You will also support with advising the Research project teams and Data Management & Dashboard teams based in Europe, India and Singapore.

Technical Expertise


Python (3 to 6 years) experience for data processing, automation, and pipeline support
Experience managing end-to-end data pipelines (ingestion, transformation, storage, outputs)


Database Expertise


Strong SQL skills using PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MS SQL
Experience with data modelling and working with data marts / warehouses to support dashboard performance.


Dashboarding & Visualization


Hands-on experience with Power BI, Tableau, or similar BI tools
Ability to support dashboard population, maintenance, and data validation


Cloud & Platform Exposure (Nice to Have)


Exposure to cloud-based data processing environments (AWS or Google Cloud)
Familiarity with version control and structured deployment processes


Soft Skills & Behaviors


Clear communicator with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
Strong ownership and accountability for end-to-end data delivery
High attention to detail with a strong data quality mindset
Ability to prioritise and manage multiple tasks in a deadline-driven environment
Strong analytical, problem-solving skills and Comfortable working in global, cross-functional teams


Life at Inizio Ignite | Research Partnership:

We love what we do and continuously strive for innovation and creativity. We believe everyone should continuously be learning and provide:


A comprehensive training and development programme for all staff, from entry level apprentice to senior management
Opportunities for international travel and collaboration
A relaxed and friendly working environment


Further information:

This is a full-time role and is available in a hybrid pattern, based at our fantastic Inizio Advisory location in Gurugram. This role’s working hours will be 13:30 to 22:30 from Monday to Thursday and 11:30 to 20:30 on Friday.

Any specific information that you would want us to gather from the candidates.

Technical:


Experience with Python
Experience with PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MS SQL
Experience managing end-to-end data pipelines
Experience with data warehousing / data marts


Capabilities:

Working with a globally distributed team

description:
Please note that rosters are predetermined. Before applying please ensure you are available to cover the following roster

Monday: 11.30am - 3.30pm
Tuesday: OFF

Thursday: 11.30am - 3.30pm

Do work that matters

As the public face of CommBank, the Retail Banking Services (RBS) team delivers a seamless banking experience to more than 10 million personal and small business customers. We’ve been serving our local communities for over 100 years, with market-leading products, services and technology.

What we do has real impact at all stages of people’s lives, from opening their first account, saving for a holiday, buying their first home, or planning for retirement. Working with us in RBS means you’ll positively impact our customers’ lives, and be there for them when they need us.

See yourself in our team

As a Customer Service Representative in our St Marys Branch you’ll be:


Responding to customers transactional banking needs, delivering a seamless customer experience
Processing transactions including deposits, withdrawals, bank cheques, transfers & CommFX
Completing financial health checks to assess customers’ needs, identify any changes or needs for specific products or services
Assisting with Cash/ATM procedures
Educating and demonstrating of our in-branch technology and digital banking options for customers
Adhering to the Bank’s processes and procedures, including accurately reconciling transactions, reviewing customers’ financial positions & championing our strong risk culture


We’re interested in hearing from people who have:


A genuine passion for Customer Service and are looking to kick-start your career in Banking with this entry-level position
A genuine interest in improving the financial wellbeing and lives of our customers
The ability to ask the right questions, respond to customers’ needs and refer them to the relevant team members in order to better serve their needs
Excellent communication skills & willingness to contribute to a collaborative culture
Ability to work in a busy, commercial and driven retail environment whilst seeing the big picture for customers and providing them with holistic solutions 


What’s Next: As part of our application process, you may be required to complete an online assessment. We'd encourage you to complete these steps within 48 hours of applying.

With us, you’ll help customers make the right financial decisions and achieve their dreams. 

If this role sounds like the perfect fit then we’d love to hear from you. Apply today!
